metadata.description: Agent skills for plan-driven development: explore and converge → write the plan → execute the plan.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Plan-driven development trio: dev-explore maps the code terrain, clarifies the requirement, and converges on a direction; dev-write-plan turns it into a self-contained implementation plan; dev-execute-plan lands it on the current branch. Each skill works standalone; run in sequence they chain hand-offs.
